faq.question: What is the best material for window frames?
faq.answer: The guide “Which Window Frame Material Is Right for You” covers this in detail: check seal failure, drafts, condensation between panes, operation problems and rising energy bills — any two of these usually justify a professional assessment.

faq.question: How should Bay Area homeowners apply “Which Window Frame Material Is Right for You”?
faq.answer: Use “Which Window Frame Material Is Right for You” as a starting point, then factor in the home's age, opening condition, exposure and budget before choosing products or scheduling work.

faq.question: When should I get professional help after reading “Which Window Frame Material Is Right for You”?
faq.answer: Bring in a professional when the situation covered in “Which Window Frame Material Is Right for You” involves safety, water intrusion, structural damage, uncertain measurements or a full replacement decision.
